Hive Mind.name: The Horror
Hive Mind.effect: The target must pass a Leadership test with a -1 penalty.

Hive Mind.name: Paroxysm
Hive Mind.effect: The target may not use a Defensive Reaction.

Hive Mind.name: Warp Blast
Hive Mind.effect:
The target suffers one automatic hit with one of the two profiles:
Burst S: 5 AP: -3 D: 1; Explosive, Seeking.
Lance S: 10 AP: -4 D: 3; AT(3), Seeking.

Hive Mind.name: Neuroparasite
Hive Mind.effect: Each model of the target must succeed on a Toughness test or receive one Mortal Wound.

Hive Mind.name: Onslaught
Hive Mind.effect: All weapon types ignore the to hit penalty for "Advance" and "Charge" orders. The unit gains the "Frenzy(2")" ability.
